personas.name: Low income user
personas.description: A user who need an inexpensive way to relieve stress
goals: To relieve stress from day to day life
To not encure extra living costs what would add more stress
pain_points: Important features are locked behind payed options
No option for free trial is provided
context: Uses the app after long stressful days at work
Helps user relax in their free time
constraints: App should not add add extra stress

personas.name: Frequent Meditator
personas.description: A user who frequently uses the app to assit with daily meditation
goals: To meditate using the app every day
To have good meditation sessions to relieve stress
context: Meditates every morning to start the day
constraints: Choosing a guided meditation should be user freindly

personas.name: User who suffers from insomnia and anxiety
personas.description: A user who relies on the app to relieve anxiety and assist with sleep
goals: Build a routine to assist with sleeping
context: Listens to sleepcasts to help them fall asleep
constraints: App should not cause users any unwanted anxiety

personas.name: Bug reporter
personas.description: A user who frequently encounters bugs while using the app
goals: To locate bugs in the app
To notify app developers and other users
To improve user experience of the app
pain_points: No way to provide feedback except through reviews
context: Uses all features of the app to locate bugs
Is more interested in fixing bugs than new features
constraints: Users should be able to provided feedback
User feedback should be considered to fix bugs

personas.name: Android device user
personas.description: A user who frequently uses the app on their android device
goals: To use the app to meditate once and awhile
Wants to explore the features of the app and consider subscribing
pain_points: Issues with the app pretaining to their device
When features are not available due to using an android
context: Uses the app in bed on their phone
constraints: All features must be available to android devices
App should have same reliablity across devices
